programme.title: Game On: Journey to the NCAA C'ship
Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: This week Bryce & Veronica are managing expectations with two tricky buyers who want a lot more for a lot less. They're hunting for a funky warehouse conversion for Wendy and her teenage daughter Makira in Melbourne's inner city, as well as a character cottage for hipsters Marty and Jude who don't want kids but are trying for a dog! These buyers know what they want and they're not about to compromise. But something's got to give and it's Bryce and Veronica's job to find out what...

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Bob has been collecting property he can't afford for years in an effort to help his friends. Now, having lost his job he must sell his '70s penthouse, and while it conjures up images of luxury, the reality is anything but.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Lesley urgently needs help to sell her dated, dark house with its dungeon-like brick interior. Can Andrew, Charlie and Shaynna transform it into the big beach house buyers expect from this fabulous coastal location?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of their son, Mohammed and Habiba's once-beloved Edmondson Park home feels empty and full of sadness. Dennis and Wendy take on the challenge of restoring love to it.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Catherine and Mick found love later in life. After both confronting serious health issues they realised there was no time like the present to build their dream home The big question is what? Having spent two years scouring Australia on the hunt for the perfect block, they settle on 50 acres atop the spectacular rolling hills of South Australia's Fleurieu Peninsula and set about building a remarkable structure that more resembles a corrugated iron shed than a house! But weather conditions in this rugged coastal location can be ferocious, and time delays and budget blowouts put a huge amount of pressure on the project and Mick and Catherine's relationship. Will their new home become their own little patch of paradise, or a rattly and expensive tin shed in hurricane?

programme.title: George Clarke's Beautiful Builds
programme.desc: Dan and Immy on the beach in Exmouth choose between a high-end kitchen to suit their eclectic taste, or a Mediterranean garden.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: The team help the Rowland family end their decade-long debate. Julie and Allen have been unable to agree on any of the 100 or so houses they've viewed. They're also at a loss when it comes to renovating.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Phil revisits Bethan and Richard in Bedfordshire eight years after their 2016 search. Kirstie catches up with Nicole and Adam, who finally took the plunge in Bexleyheath in 2023.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: A street is to become the site for a futuristic build that has the whole neighbourhood talking. It will be a diagonal structure with a Palm Springs aesthetic that will push the boundaries.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of their son, Mohammed and Habiba's once-beloved Edmondson Park home feels empty and full of sadness. Dennis and Wendy take on the challenge of restoring love to it.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Georgia and John and their three small kids are feeling cramped in their current home. Georgia is tired of the impractical layout of their house and wants to replace the pool with a sizeable backyard. John thinks by increasing the floor plan of their Queenslander the solution is underneath their current living space.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Chris is rushed in after a lorry crush injury, Elizabeth is treated after a fall and retired miner Alan shares memories while staff handle a busy shift.

programme.title: Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers take on The Celebrity Traitors, Strictly, Hollyoaks, Dragons' Den, Beat the Chasers, Celebrity Help My House Is Haunted and BBC News.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Bob has been collecting property he can't afford for years in an effort to help his friends. Now, having lost his job he must sell his '70s penthouse, and while it conjures up images of luxury, the reality is anything but.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: In Children's Week, the sewers tackle a sequined bomber jacket, create animal-themed fancy dress from beach towels, and design outfits inspired by childhood photos for mini models.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.sub-title: Japanese Tea Set And A Handle Pulling Challenge
programme.desc: It's Raku week, which sees the potters throw a Japanese-inspired tea set. In the spot test, guest judge social media sensation Florian Gadsby sets a handle pulling challenge.

programme.title: Britain's Most Luxurious Train Journeys
programme.desc: Come onboard for some luxury train rides across Britain, with beautiful views, friendly company and staff who take care of a passenger's every need.

programme.title: World's Most Expensive Cruise
programme.desc: The final episode of the series sees the stunning Seven Seas Splendor sailing around the Canary Islands while celebrating the company's 30th anniversary. For Assistant Cruise Director Alex and Social Hostess, Annabel, this means organising a glitzy black and gold themed party for the end of the cruise. But before the voyage can begin, the ship is docked in Gibraltar for the very first time and it's fallen to Annabel to give a guided tour to local dignitaries and ensure they will welcome the ship back to port for future cruises. There are plenty of dazzling details Annabel can show off to the VIPs but also a few hitches along the tour, so the ship's relationship with Gibraltar hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell aim to reunite family members after years of separation.

programme.desc: A street is to become the site for a futuristic build that has the whole neighbourhood talking. It will be a diagonal structure with a Palm Springs aesthetic that will push the boundaries.

programme.title: Grand Designs UK
programme.desc: In 2015 Stuart & Rosie from Wirral tried turning small nineteen sixties bungalow into slick twenty first century family home for one hundred seventy five thousand pounds. Kevin revisits.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of their son, Mohammed and Habiba's once-beloved Edmondson Park home feels empty and full of sadness. Dennis and Wendy take on the challenge of restoring love to it.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Amanda, Paul and David are siblings who sadly lost their doctor parents in the MH17 plane crash over Ukraine in July 2014. They are selling their five-bedroom family home on a bushy 12 acres near Toowoomba. A touching story as the family is well-loved and respected in the area. Also, they're prepared to donate some of the profits to Medicines Sans Frontiers.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan heads to Birmingham to surprise Georgie Moseley. Inspired by where the Moseley family spent their final holiday together, the team transform her grim backyard into an Ibizan-style hideaway full of memories.

programme.title: Country House Rescue
programme.desc: Ruth visits Garston Manor, a Grade II listed Georgian house on the outskirts of Watford. Built in 1812, headmistress Sheila O'Neill bought the house as a wreck for 500,000 pounds from the local council.

programme.desc: Davina was 44 and felt like she was losing it - hot flushes, depression, mental fog. Now she tells her menopause story, busting midlife taboos from sex to hormone treatment.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are in West London helping two couples find their dream first homes in this perilous property market. Not only is property expensive here, but it often sells in record time so Phil and Kirstie will need to summon all their property know-how if they want to be the first over the finish line. Dance-mad newlyweds Keon and Zoe are taking their first step onto the London property ladder and are looking for a family home with space for future children and room for their favourite hobby, salsa dancing. They are renting in Shepherd's Bush and would love to stay in the area, but even with their healthy budget of 450,000 pounds, Phil has the ultimate challenge on his hands if he's to find them all the space they want in this pricey patch. Kirstie is a little further west in the borough of Richmond, helping Carolyn and Paul who are also looking to buy their first home together. Paul has bought property before in his native Sheffield and is struggling to get his head around the price of property in the capital. They have a budget of 325,000 pounds and for that, Carolyn is desperate for somewhere with outside space so she can dry her delicates on the washing line. Will Kirstie be able to help this couple find their dream home at the right price?

Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime. The one thing that, he didn't plan on was being double-crossed. Now he wants more than the job's payoff...he wants payback.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When detectives Ricardo Tubbs and Sonny Crockett are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two Miami cops must find $100 million in stolen heroin before their department is shut down. With time running out, detectives Burnett and Lowrey track a master thief into the Miami underworld, dodging bullets and bad guys along the way. A sexy witness can identify the suspect, but a mix-up causes her to believe Burnett is Lowrey, forcing the partners to switch identities. Now, between shoot-outs and car chases, married man Burnett has to stick close to their only witness, while playboy Lowrey goes home to his partner's wife and kids to learn the joys of parenthood - the hard way.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Dom Toretto and Brian O'Conner lead a reunion of returning all-stars from every chapter of the explosive franchise built on speed to assemble for a high-stakes race that places an unlikely alliance of cops and racers in from Rio de Janeiro. The team must also defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all dead. A dogged federal agent whose strike team tears through South America in hot pursuit, but soon has a difficult time determining the good men from the bad.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller, a father's teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years. Desperate and determined to rescue his son at all costs, he makes a deal with the US attorney to work as an undercover informant and infiltrate a drug cartel on a dangerous mission risking everything, including his family and his own life.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: In this sequel, the GI Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra, they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: Hard Kill
programme.desc: A billionaire CEO hires a team of mercenaries to protect a lethal piece of technology when his daughter is kidnapped.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. Together, the threesome must find a way to stop the ultimate enemy - the T-1000, the most lethal Terminator ever created. This visual tour de force is also a touching human story of survival.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Phillip Noyce directs Angelina Jolie as Evelyn Salt, a CIA officer who swore an oath to duty, honour and country. When she is accused by a defector of being a Russian sleeper spy, Salt goes on the run to clear her name and ultimately prove her loyalty. Using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative, she must elude capture and protect her family or the world's most powerful forces will erase any trace of her existence. With her superiors convinced she's out to assassinate the president, she also must race the clock to learn the identity of the real traitor.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Dom Toretto and Brian O'Conner lead a reunion of returning all-stars from every chapter of the explosive franchise built on speed to assemble for a high-stakes race that places an unlikely alliance of cops and racers in from Rio de Janeiro. The team must also defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all dead. A dogged federal agent whose strike team tears through South America in hot pursuit, but soon has a difficult time determining the good men from the bad.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle against the Decepticons, who have returned stronger than ever with a plan to destroy our world.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: Capitol Policeman John Cale has just been denied his dream job with the Secret Service of protecting President James Sawyer. Not wanting to let down his little girl with the news, he takes her on a tour of the White House, during which the complex is overtaken by a heavily armed paramilitary group. Now, with the nation's government falling into chaos and time running out, it's up to Cale to save the president, his daughter, and the country.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: On the turbo-charged streets of Los Angeles, every night is a championship race. With nitro-boosted fury, Dominic Toretto rules the road, turning all his challengers into dust. He and his rival, Johnny Tran, are the boldest, the baddest, and the best, but now there's new rage on the road. They know he's tough, they know he's fast, but what they don't know is that he's a speed demon detective with enough drive and determination to come out the winner.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: It's the nitro-fuelled answer to the question: how fast do you like it? Now an ex-cop on the run, Brian O'Connor hooks into outlaw street-racing. When the Feds strong-arm him back, O'Connor's no rules, win-or-die skills are unleashed against an international drug lord. With his velocity-addicted buddy riding shotgun, and a drop-dead-gorgeous undercover agent dialling up the heat, this film accelerates the action into a desperate race for survival, justice and mind-blowing, jaw-dropping speed.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When convicted street racer Sean Boswell tries to start a new life on the other side of the world, his obsession with racing sets him on a collision course with the Japanese underworld. To survive, he will have to master drifting - a new style of racing where tricked-out cars slide through hairpin turns, defying gravity and death for the ultimate road rush.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When detectives Ricardo Tubbs and Sonny Crockett are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers, whose mastermind is aided by the love Dom thought was dead, Letty. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level, so Hobbs asks for the help of Dom and his elite team.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs. Crash landing, with no memory of his past, Bumblebee takes refuge in a junkyard disguised as a VW Beetle. Charlie (Hailee Steinfeld), a teenager trying to find her place in the world, discovers and repairs the battle-scarred robot. When the Decepticons forge an alliance with a secret agency led by Agent Burns (John Cena) to hunt down the remaining Autobots, Bumblebee and Charlie team up to protect the world in an action-packed adventure filled with humour and heart that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: The world's hunger for extreme sports and reality competitions has grown into reality TV bloodlust. Now, the most extreme racing competition has emerged and its contestants are murderous prisoners. The rules of the Death Race are simple: win five events and you're set free. Lose and you're road kill splashed across the Internet.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons' all-consuming evil.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Dom Toretto and Brian O'Conner lead a reunion of returning all-stars from every chapter of the explosive franchise built on speed to assemble for a high-stakes race that places an unlikely alliance of cops and racers in from Rio de Janeiro. The team must also defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all dead. A dogged federal agent whose strike team tears through South America in hot pursuit, but soon has a difficult time determining the good men from the bad.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers, whose mastermind is aided by the love Dom thought was dead, Letty. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level, so Hobbs asks for the help of Dom and his elite team.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Johnny Blaze was only a teenage stunt biker when he sold his soul to the devil. Years later, Johnny is a world renowned daredevil by day, but at night, he becomes the Ghost Rider of Marvel Comics legend. The devil's bounty hunter, he is charged with finding evil souls on earth and bringing them to hell. But when a twist of fate brings Johnny's long-lost love back into his life, Johnny realises he just might have a second chance at happiness - if he can beat the devil and win back his soul. To do so he'll have to defeat Blackheart, the devil's nemesis and wayward son, whose plot to take over his father's realm will bring hell on earth - unless Ghost Rider can stop him.

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: Workaholic assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on vacation to Plummerville but soon faces a corrupt theme-park owner, a crooked sheriff and a ruthless crime boss.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: Targeted by a cold-blooded black ops assassin with a score to settle, their only hope is to get behind the wheel again and secure an ingenious prototype tracking device. Facing their greatest threat yet in places as far away as Abu Dhabi and as familiar as the Los Angeles streets they call home, the crew must come together once again as a team, and as a family, to protect their own.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle against the Decepticons, who have returned stronger than ever with a plan to destroy our world.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller, a father's teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years. Desperate and determined to rescue his son at all costs, he makes a deal with the US attorney to work as an undercover informant and infiltrate a drug cartel on a dangerous mission risking everything, including his family and his own life.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. During a transatlantic flight from New York City to London, US Air Marshal Bill Marks receives a series of cryptic text messages demanding that he instruct the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account. Until he secures the money, a passenger on his flight will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: Hard Kill
programme.desc: A billionaire CEO hires a team of mercenaries to protect a lethal piece of technology when his daughter is kidnapped.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: This film begins after an epic battle left a great city torn, but with the world saved. As humanity picks up the pieces, a shadowy group reveals itself in an attempt to control the direction of history ... while an ancient, powerful new menace sets Earth in its crosshairs. With help from a new cast of humans, Optimus Prime and the Autobots rise to meet their most fearsome challenge yet. In an incredible adventure, they are swept up in a war of good and evil, ultimately leading to a climactic battle across the world.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: Targeted by a cold-blooded black ops assassin with a score to settle, their only hope is to get behind the wheel again and secure an ingenious prototype tracking device. Facing their greatest threat yet in places as far away as Abu Dhabi and as familiar as the Los Angeles streets they call home, the crew must come together once again as a team, and as a family, to protect their own.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman is caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home. Now a hardworking life insurance salesman and a caring family man, the former police officer, Michael MacCauley, has taken the commuter rail to New York for the past ten years. But, unexpectedly, things will take a turn for the worse, when on one of his daily journeys, the cryptic passenger, Joanna, makes Michael a generous and tempting offer to locate a single commuter or face grave consequences. Is this a sick joke, or is this indeed a serious situation? As Michael races against the clock to solve this wicked conundrum, everyone aboard is a suspect, in a deal where there's definitely more than meets the eye. Can he decide in time who's the one?

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. During a transatlantic flight from New York City to London, US Air Marshal Bill Marks receives a series of cryptic text messages demanding that he instruct the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account. Until he secures the money, a passenger on his flight will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Wrath of Man
programme.desc: Mysterious and wild-eyed, a new security guard for a cash truck company surprises his co-workers when he unleashes precision skills during a heist. The crew is left wondering who he is and where he came from. Soon, the marksman's ultimate motive becomes clear as he takes dramatic and irrevocable steps to settle a score.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: Now that Dom and Letty are married, Brian and Mia have retired from the game, and the rest of the crew have been exonerated, the globetrotting team has found a semblance of a normal life. But when a mysterious woman seduces Dom into the world of crime he can't seem to escape, they will face trials that will test them as never before. From the shores of Cuba and the streets of New York City to the icy plains off the arctic Barents Sea, our elite force will criss-cross the globe to stop an anarchist from unleashing chaos on the world's stage, and bring home the man who made them a family.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons' all-consuming evil.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Johnny Blaze was only a teenage stunt biker when he sold his soul to the devil. Years later, Johnny is a world renowned daredevil by day, but at night, he becomes the Ghost Rider of Marvel Comics legend. The devil's bounty hunter, he is charged with finding evil souls on earth and bringing them to hell. But when a twist of fate brings Johnny's long-lost love back into his life, Johnny realises he just might have a second chance at happiness - if he can beat the devil and win back his soul. To do so he'll have to defeat Blackheart, the devil's nemesis and wayward son, whose plot to take over his father's realm will bring hell on earth - unless Ghost Rider can stop him.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Hummingbird
programme.desc: After returning from Afghanistan disillusioned and homeless, an ex-Special Forces soldier returns home a damaged man, struggling to find justice in a world saturated with violence in this gritty, explosive story about London's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. The key to saving the future lies buried in the secrets of the past and the hidden history of Transformers on Earth. Now, it's up to the unlikely alliance of Cade Yeager, Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the world.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: Now that Dom and Letty are married, Brian and Mia have retired from the game, and the rest of the crew have been exonerated, the globetrotting team has found a semblance of a normal life. But when a mysterious woman seduces Dom into the world of crime he can't seem to escape, they will face trials that will test them as never before. From the shores of Cuba and the streets of New York City to the icy plains off the arctic Barents Sea, our elite force will criss-cross the globe to stop an anarchist from unleashing chaos on the world's stage, and bring home the man who made them a family.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. When a local protest against wealthy landlord Daniel Christie results in the death of his father, Joseph seeks revenge. But his attempt vengeance is thwarted by Shannon Christie, the landlord's high-spirited and headstrong daughter, who stabs Joseph with a pitchfork. While convalescing at the Christie's manor, Joseph is propositioned by Shannon, who asks him to travel with her to America - where she is determined to acquire some of the free land being given away in the Oklahoma Territory. Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Not that Bridget's counting, but it's been six weeks, four days, and seven hours with flawless boyfriend, Mark Darcy. When Daniel Cleaver returns, can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever?

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: Natalie and Nick are frustrated with their luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

programme.title: Pride And Prejudice (2005)
programme.desc: Mr Bennet is an English gentleman living in Hertfordshire with his overbearing wife and five daughters; the beautiful Jane, the clever Elizabeth, the bookish Mary, the immature Kitty and the wild Lydia. Unfortunately for the Bennet's, if Mr Bennet dies their house will be inherited by a distant cousin whom they have never met, so the family's future happiness and security is dependent on the daughters making good marriages. Life is uneventful until the arrival in the neighbourhood of the rich gentleman Mr Bingley, who rents a large house so he can spend the summer in the country. Mr Bingley brings with him his two sisters and the dashing but proud Mr Darcy. Love is soon in the air for one of the Bennet sisters, while another may have jumped to a hasty prejudgment. For the Bennet sisters many trials and tribulations stand between them and their happiness, including class, gossip and scandal.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: An engaged couple keep getting tripped up on their long walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: An engaged couple keep getting tripped up on their long walk down the aisle.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, an aspiring Portland chef, tries to win a food truck competition. When a handsome chef from a rival food truck parks across the street from her, Cleo's goal to win takes a spicy turn.

programme.title: Angry Angel
programme.desc: Allison Pyke is a young angel who's trying to get her ticket into heaven. Complications arise when two important men in her life unexpectedly show up to form a love triangle.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: Art of the Kill
programme.desc: Angie Dove, her father and Detective Carter investigate murder, theft, blackmail and fraud at the museum.

programme.title: Catch and Release
programme.desc: Gray Wheeler just lost everything. But it could be the best thing that ever happened to her. After the death of her fiance, Gray moves in with her late love's best friends. While Sam and Dennis do their best to cheer Gray up, Fritz doesn't seem to care. Once Gray breaks through Fritz's defences, however, she finally sees why her fiance thought so highly of him. As they spend more time together, Gray learns that her chances for love have not died out with her fiance. But when some surprise guests show up on their doorstep, it'll take the love of all of her new friends to help Gray learn that life may be messy, but love is messier.

programme.title: Book Club
programme.desc: Four lifelong friends have their lives forever changed after reading 50 Shades of Grey in their monthly book club.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: Lisa is a professional softball player who finds herself adrift when she is suddenly dumped from the team. Confused and looking for direction, Lisa begins a fling with self-centred womaniser Matty, a major league baseball pitcher eager to have his ego stroked.

programme.title: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A hilarious romantic comedy about men, women, and everything that can go wrong between them. Sparks fly when brilliant divorce attorney Miles Massey meets his match in the beautiful but ruthless Marylin Rexroth.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, an aspiring Portland chef, tries to win a food truck competition. When a handsome chef from a rival food truck parks across the street from her, Cleo's goal to win takes a spicy turn.

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Set in the Los Angeles of the slight future, this film follows Theodore Twombly, a complex, soulful man who makes his living writing touching, personal letters for other people. Heartbroken after the end of a long relationship, he becomes intrigued with a new, advanced operating system, which promises to be an intuitive entity in its own right, individual to each user. Upon initiating it, he is delighted to meet "Samantha", a bright, female voice, who is insightful, sensitive and surprisingly funny. As her needs and desires grow, in tandem with his own, their friendship deepens into an eventual love for each other. An original love story that explores the evolving nature - and the risks - of intimacy in the modern world.

programme.title: Angry Angel
programme.desc: Allison Pyke is a young angel who's trying to get her ticket into heaven. Complications arise when two important men in her life unexpectedly show up to form a love triangle.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: Art of the Kill
programme.desc: Angie Dove, her father and Detective Carter investigate murder, theft, blackmail and fraud at the museum.

programme.title: Book Club
programme.desc: Four lifelong friends have their lives forever changed after reading 50 Shades of Grey in their monthly book club.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: Lisa is a professional softball player who finds herself adrift when she is suddenly dumped from the team. Confused and looking for direction, Lisa begins a fling with self-centred womaniser Matty, a major league baseball pitcher eager to have his ego stroked.

programme.title: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A hilarious romantic comedy about men, women, and everything that can go wrong between them. Sparks fly when brilliant divorce attorney Miles Massey meets his match in the beautiful but ruthless Marylin Rexroth.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah appears on TV as a guest on a televised bake-off, but someone on the show is found murdered, so Hannah helps her detective boyfriend find the killer.

programme.title: Love Letters
programme.desc: An ambitious U.S. Senator reflects back on his life after the death of a woman whom he loved and kept in contact with only through correspondence. The two first meet as children and begin their lifelong correspondence. He grows into his political aspirations and leaves her behind, as she becomes a struggling artist. While he is successful, she has a rocky life.

programme.title: More Sex & the Single Mom
programme.desc: A woman's life turns chaotic when her ex-lover returns and her daughter becomes infatuated with an older man.

programme.title: It Could Happen to You
programme.desc: In this heart-warming comedy, Charlie Lang buys a lottery ticket, leaving him short of cash to tip Yvonne, the waitress in his favourite lunch spot. Charlie offers her half the winnings and when the ticket pays $4 million, he incurs the wrath of his wife, Muriel, by honouring his promise. Muriel screams and goes manic when the winning number is read on the TV, and she screams twice as loud when Charlie finally tells her what he has done. As Charlie and Muriel grow apart, Charlie and Yvonne grow together.

programme.title: Friends with Benefits
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Mila Kunis star as best friends who are both coming out of disastrous relationships. They decide to make a 'friends with benefits' pact vowing to stop the casual sex if either become emotionally attached. While the set-up works at first, soon the two friends fall in love and must re-evaluate what they mean to each other.

programme.title: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Featuring the music of George Michael, this film follows a hapless Londoner who works in a Christmas shop and becomes involved with a man who could be the answer to her problems.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda, realizes the man she lives with has been unfaithful. Two women who have never met and live 6000 miles apart, find themselves in the exact same place. They meet online at a home exchange website and impulsively switch homes for the holiday. Iris moves into Amanda's L.A. house in sunny California as Amanda arrives in the snow covered English countryside. Shortly after arriving at their destinations, both women find the last thing either wants or expects: a new romance. Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah appears on TV as a guest on a televised bake-off, but someone on the show is found murdered, so Hannah helps her detective boyfriend find the killer.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: After George is downsized from his financial firm and Linda's depressing documentary is cancelled, they can no longer afford their overpriced 'micro-loft' in New York. They find themselves with just one option - to pack up their lives and head south to move in with George's brother and his wife. George and Linda stumble upon Elysium, an idyllic community where the only rule is to be yourself.

programme.title: Love Letters
programme.desc: An ambitious U.S. Senator reflects back on his life after the death of a woman whom he loved and kept in contact with only through correspondence. The two first meet as children and begin their lifelong correspondence. He grows into his political aspirations and leaves her behind, as she becomes a struggling artist. While he is successful, she has a rocky life.

programme.title: It Could Happen to You
programme.desc: In this heart-warming comedy, Charlie Lang buys a lottery ticket, leaving him short of cash to tip Yvonne, the waitress in his favourite lunch spot. Charlie offers her half the winnings and when the ticket pays $4 million, he incurs the wrath of his wife, Muriel, by honouring his promise. Muriel screams and goes manic when the winning number is read on the TV, and she screams twice as loud when Charlie finally tells her what he has done. As Charlie and Muriel grow apart, Charlie and Yvonne grow together.

Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: With help from a handsome banker, Maddie tries to save her business. When her first love returns home, she must choose between a new romance and the man she never stopped loving.

programme.title: Sweet Revenge: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: As Hannah and Mike balance their personal lives and busy careers, a murder at a 24-hour gym complicates their wedding plans.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Advice to Love By
programme.desc: When a love advice author and a dating columnist cross paths, attraction blooms into more. Using strategies from their own playbooks, it's possible they've met their match: each other.

programme.title: The Change-Up
programme.desc: In this switching places comedy, two best friends wake up in each other's bodies after a drunken night, and become very alarmed with the outcome.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Adam Sandler and Drew Barrymore reunite again since starring in THE WEDDING SINGER. Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise, spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached, until he meets Lucy. He and Lucy hit it off from the get-go, but the next day she acts like she doesn't know him. Has his karma come around to kick him in the butt or what? Actually, Lucy has short-term memory loss so every night all memory of her day is erased. But a man in love will go to any lengths to win over the girl of his dreams, and if that means having to find imaginative ways of doing it over again every day, then Henry's up for the challenge.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: With help from a handsome banker, Maddie tries to save her business. When her first love returns home, she must choose between a new romance and the man she never stopped loving.

programme.title: The End of the Affair
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Graham Greene, Oscar-winner Neil Jordan directs this romantic drama starring Ralph Fiennes as novelist Maurice Bendrix who, during World War II, had an affair with Sarah Miles (Julianne Moore), the wife of his best friend Henry (Stephen Rea). Sarah abruptly broke off the romance in 1944, but two years later after Maurice runs into Henry, he becomes obsessed with the affair and hires a man to investigate and reintroduces himself into Sarah's life, but she fears that being near him would be too great a temptation. Trivia: The End of the Affair was previously brought to the screen in 1955 by Edward Dmytryk; Julianne Moore personally wrote a letter to director Neil Jordan asking for the part in the film; the film that Maurice and Sarah see is 21 Days (1940). Graham Greene co-wrote the script for 21 Days.

programme.title: Sweet Revenge: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: As Hannah and Mike balance their personal lives and busy careers, a murder at a 24-hour gym complicates their wedding plans.

programme.title: Advice to Love By
programme.desc: When a love advice author and a dating columnist cross paths, attraction blooms into more. Using strategies from their own playbooks, it's possible they've met their match: each other.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Kiss My Act
programme.desc: An aspiring stand-up comedian with low self-esteem gives her best material to a pretty colleague who attracts a talent scout.

programme.title: Some Kind of Wonderful
programme.desc: From the director of Pretty in Pink, comes this high-school romance starring Eric Stoltz as a misfit whose crush on a teen queen takes him on a voyage of self discovery. Keith (Stoltz) thinks he is in love with Amanda (Lea Thompson) while tomboy Watts (Mary Stuart Masterson) pines for Keith. Meanwhile, Amanda wishes she were loved by her current boyfriend, Hardy Jenns ( Craig Sheffer), whilst Hardy is only in love with himself.

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: Will is a father who decides to tell his daughter the story of how he met her mother, when she starts asking questions about sex and relationships. Will discovers that a second look at the past might also give him a second chance at the future. It's definitely never too late to go back and maybe find a happy ending.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: A murdered man returns to save the woman he loves from a similar fate.

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Tripp is a 35-year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him? It's free, he's got a great room, and mum does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little push. They just didn't expect Tripp would push back!

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Join Diane Keaton, Bette Midler and Goldie Hawn in this sinfully satisfying revenge romp about a trio of first wives who team up to teach their lying, cheating ex-husbands a lesson. Ivana Trump's galvanising cameo - 'don't get mad, dahlinks, get everytink' - sets the scene in a comedy that hinges on the self-mockery of its ageless stars. Midler's ball-busting shtick, Keaton's ditsy vulnerability and Hawn's eternal youth are just light-hearted grist for the mill of female friendship as a serious source of strength.

programme.title: Very Valentine
programme.desc: A woman tries to save her family's wedding shoe business that is teetering on the brink of financial collapse.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Kiss My Act
programme.desc: An aspiring stand-up comedian with low self-esteem gives her best material to a pretty colleague who attracts a talent scout.

programme.title: Some Kind of Wonderful
programme.desc: From the director of Pretty in Pink, comes this high-school romance starring Eric Stoltz as a misfit whose crush on a teen queen takes him on a voyage of self discovery. Keith (Stoltz) thinks he is in love with Amanda (Lea Thompson) while tomboy Watts (Mary Stuart Masterson) pines for Keith. Meanwhile, Amanda wishes she were loved by her current boyfriend, Hardy Jenns ( Craig Sheffer), whilst Hardy is only in love with himself.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna Scott is the world's most famous movie star. Her picture has been plastered on the cover of every magazine, and every time she makes a movie, the entire world knows about it. William Thacker owns a travel bookstore in the quaint neighbourhood of Notting Hill. His business is stagnant, he has the roommate from hell and his love life is completely non-existent. Then one day, their paths cross and the couple comes to face the ultimate question: can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Tripp is a 35-year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him? It's free, he's got a great room, and mum does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little push. They just didn't expect Tripp would push back!

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Join Diane Keaton, Bette Midler and Goldie Hawn in this sinfully satisfying revenge romp about a trio of first wives who team up to teach their lying, cheating ex-husbands a lesson. Midler's ball-busting shtick, Keaton's ditsy vulnerability and Hawn's eternal youth are just light-hearted grist for the mill of female friendship as a serious source of strength.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A small-town police chief investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.title: The Boxer
programme.desc: After being in prison for his involvement with the IRA, Danny Flynn re-opens a boxing ring in effort to heal his Belfast community, finding that a legacy of violence is not easily escaped.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Prescription For Murder
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor aids a detective in investigating a rapidly growing string of murders at Atlanta Memorial Hospital.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman is caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home. Now a hardworking life insurance salesman and a caring family man, the former police officer, Michael MacCauley, has taken the commuter rail to New York for the past ten years. But, unexpectedly, things will take a turn for the worse, when on one of his daily journeys, the cryptic passenger, Joanna, makes Michael a generous and tempting offer to locate a single commuter or face grave consequences. Is this a sick joke, or is this indeed a serious situation? As Michael races against the clock to solve this wicked conundrum, everyone aboard is a suspect, in a deal where there's definitely more than meets the eye. Can he decide in time who's the one?

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: Hanna is a teenage girl. Uniquely, she has the strength, the stamina, and the smarts of a soldier; these come from being raised by her father, an ex-CIA man, in the wilds of Finland. Living a life unlike any other teenager, her upbringing and training have been one and the same, all geared to making her the perfect assassin. The turning point in her adolescence is a sharp one; sent into the world by her father on a mission, Hanna journeys stealthily across Europe while eluding agents dispatched after her by a ruthless intelligence operative with secrets of her own. As she nears her ultimate target, Hanna faces startling revelations about her existence and unexpected questions about her humanity.

programme.title: Red Dragon
programme.desc: Ex-FBI agent Will Graham is an expert investigator who quit the Bureau after almost losing his life in the process of capturing the elusive Dr Hannibal Lecter. Years later, after a series of particularly grisly murders, Graham reluctantly agrees to come out of retirement and assist in a mysterious case. But he soon realises that the best way to catch this killer, known as the Tooth Fairy, is to find a way to get inside the killer's mind.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A small-town police chief investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
programme.desc: A man fails a lie detector test and confesses to brutally murdering his pregnant wife Shan'ann and their two young daughters.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: An action-thriller about a woman accidentally caught in a dark deal that turns the tables on her captors. Altered by a dangerous new drug allowing her to use 100% of her brain capacity, Lucy transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate the untimely death of a renowned crime novelist. Blanc must sift through a web of red herrings and lies to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change
programme.desc: A small-town police chief (Tom Selleck) reopens a 12-year-old murder case while investigating a rape aboard a yacht.

programme.title: Les Miserables (2012)
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of 19th-century France, this is the enthralling story of broken dreams and unrequited love, passion, sacrifice and redemption, and a timeless testament to the survival of the human spirit. Ex-prisoner Jean Valjean is hunted for decades by the ruthless policeman Javert after he breaks parole. When Valjean agrees to care for factory worker Fantine's young daughter, Cosette, their lives change forever.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: John Dillinger, a charismatic and elusive bank robber, is marked by the FBI as America's first 'Public Enemy No.1' and Billie Frechette is the only woman capable of capturing his heart. Hunted relentlessly by top FBI agent Melvin Purvis, Dillinger engages in an escalating game of outrunning and outgunning the FBI, culminating in an explosive, legendary showdown.

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
programme.desc: A man fails a lie detector test and confesses to brutally murdering his pregnant wife Shan'ann and their two young daughters.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: An action-thriller about a woman accidentally caught in a dark deal that turns the tables on her captors. Altered by a dangerous new drug allowing her to use 100% of her brain capacity, Lucy transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

Hunted relentlessly by top FBI agent Melvin Purvis, Dillinger engages in an escalating game of outrunning and outgunning the FBI, culminating in an explosive, legendary showdown.

programme.title: Killer Under the Bed
programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden. Cady becomes a terrifying presence as he menacingly circles Bowden's increasingly unstable family. Realising he is legally powerless to protect his beautiful wife Leigh and his troubled teenage daughter Danielle, Sam resorts to unorthodox measures which lead to an unforgettable showdown on Cape Fear.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice
programme.desc: A police chief (Tom Selleck) lands in trouble with the town council after a shootout on the streets of Boston.

programme.title: The Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: This film tells the story of a disfigured musical genius who haunts the catacombs beneath the Paris Opera, waging a reign of terror over its occupants. When he falls fatally in love with the lovely Christine, the Phantom devotes himself to creating a new star for the Opera, exerting a strange sense of control over the young soprano as he nurtures her extraordinary talents.

programme.title: The Long Island Serial Killer
programme.desc: Mari Gilbert's search for her missing daughter, Shannan, uncovers the work of a serial killer on Long Island.

programme.title: Killer Under the Bed
programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden. Cady becomes a terrifying presence as he menacingly circles Bowden's increasingly unstable family. programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice
programme.desc: A police chief (Tom Selleck) lands in trouble with the town council after a shootout on the streets of Boston.

programme.title: The Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: This film tells the story of a disfigured musical genius who haunts the catacombs beneath the Paris Opera, waging a reign of terror over its occupants. When he falls fatally in love with the lovely Christine, the Phantom devotes himself to creating a new star for the Opera, exerting a strange sense of control over the young soprano as he nurtures her extraordinary talents.

programme.title: The Royal Hotel
programme.desc: Americans Hanna and Liv are best friends backpacking in Australia. After they run out of money, Liv, looking for an adventure, convinces Hanna to take a temporary live-in job behind the bar of a pub called 'The Royal Hotel' in a remote Outback mining town. Bar owner Billy and a host of locals give the girls a riotous introduction to Down Under drinking culture but soon Hanna and Liv find themselves trapped in an unnerving situation that grows rapidly out of their control.

programme.title: The Interpreter
programme.desc: In one of the hidden corridors of power at United Nations headquarters, translator Silvia Broome overhears a potentially explosive secret about a planned assassination attempt.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Seen through the eyes of a squad of American soldiers, the story begins with Wold War II's historic D-Day invasion, and then moves beyond the beach as the men embark on a dangerous special mission. Captain John Miller must take his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Faced with impossible odds, the men question their orders. Why are eight men risking their lives to save just one? Surrounded by the brutal realities of war, each man searched for his own answer - and the strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honour, decency and courage.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: Three best friends attempt to escape their suburban boredom through a life of crime. But these bickering, bumbling thieves are no match for the local 'godfather' who leads them into the biggest heist of their careers.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A murderer is loose on the streets of Manhattan. A diabolical killer whose brutal slayings leave a trail of cryptic messages hidden at the scene of the crime. Clues which only a brilliant mind can interpret. Lincoln Rhyme is a gifted but disabled detective who is assigned to the case as the city becomes gripped with fear. Amelia Donaghy is a feisty, street-smart policewoman, who together with Lincoln, must go inside the mind of this terrifying madman and defeat him at his own game.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Winnfield and Vincent Vega are two hitmen out to retrieve a suitcase stolen from their employer, mob boss Marcellus Wallace. Wallace has also asked Vincent to take his wife Mia out a few days later when Wallace himself will be out of town. Butch Coolidge is an ageing boxer who is paid by Wallace to lose his next fight. Honey Bunny and Pumpkin are a couple of young lovers and small time thieves who decide they need a change of venue. The lives of these seemingly unrelated people are woven together in a wildly entertaining and exhilarating motion picture adventure that both thrills and amuses.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Death On Duty
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor helps a detective investigate the murder of a former Marine.

programme.title: The Interpreter
programme.desc: In one of the hidden corridors of power at United Nations headquarters, translator Silvia Broome overhears a potentially explosive secret about a planned assassination attempt.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: Three best friends attempt to escape their suburban boredom through a life of crime. But these bickering, bumbling thieves are no match for the local 'godfather' who leads them into the biggest heist of their careers.

programme.title: Gothika
programme.desc: A brilliant and respected criminal psychologist, Dr Miranda Grey is an expert at knowing what is rational. Under the direction of her husband, Miranda treats dangerously disturbed patients at the Woodward Penitentiary for Women. Miranda's life is thrust into terrifying jeopardy when a cryptic encounter with a mysterious young girl leads to a nightmare beyond her wildest imagination.

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: This is the story of Kya, an abandoned girl who raised herself to adulthood in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina. For years, rumors of the "Marsh Girl" haunted Barkley Cove, isolating the sharp and resilient Kya from her community. Drawn to two young men from town, Kya opens herself to a new and startling world; but when one of them is found dead, she is immediately cast by the community as the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what actually happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal the many secrets that lay within the marsh.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Night Passage
programme.desc: A former Los Angeles lawman becomes the new police chief of a small fishing town that holds dirty secrets.

programme.title: Mahalia
programme.desc: Influential gospel singer Mahalia Jackson rises to fame in the 1940s and performs at numerous rallies during the civil rights movement.

programme.title: The Kingdom
programme.desc: FBI agents sent to Saudi Arabia to nab a mass murderer team up with their Arab counterparts in a do-or-die mission for unlikely allies.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Andrew Neyman is an ambitious young jazz drummer, single-minded in his pursuit to rise to the top of his elite east coast music conservatory. Plagued by the failed writing career of his father, Andrew hungers day and night to become one of the greats. Terence Fletcher, an instructor equally known for his teaching talents as for his terrifying methods, leads the top jazz ensemble in the school. Fletcher discovers Andrew and transfers the aspiring drummer into his band, forever changing the young man's life. Andrew's passion to achieve perfection quickly spirals into obsession, as his ruthless teacher continues to push him to the brink of both his ability and his sanity.

programme.title: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: Detective Nick Curran's investigation of a rock star's brutal murder leads him to glacial beauty and best-selling author Catherine Tramell. Despite Nick's entanglement with police psychologist Dr Beth Garner and the ever-present Roxy, Catherine's sultry and possessive girlfriend, the two begin a torrid affair. But when Nick discovers that Catherine's fictional, murderous storylines have a habit of coming true, he begins to wonder if his attraction to Catherine might turn out to be a fatal one.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: In a time when creditors have closed their purse strings and stopped lending, the residents of Detroit know they can always rely on American Jewelry and Loan, 'The Working Man's Bank'. Follow the Gold family as they wheel and deal with colourful customers, manage temperamental employees, and squabble with each other, all in the name of making a buck in one of the most troubled cities in America.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: There's a dream home - and there's a dream location. Cabin Truckers follows the incredible exploits of hauling colossal cabins to remote, picturesque locations. Watch as an expert team navigates through extremely rocky, mountainous terrain, delivering precious cargo to thrilled homeowners. Sara Wynker works for Wades House Moving and has found the perfect bungalow for her son. She made a deal with Wade to trade the house for three days of work but what should be an easy move is derailed by unexpected fog.

programme.title: Swamp People

programme.title: Outback Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant eighteen wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year. The episodes will form a narrative arch - taking the viewer on a journey from when the experienced and novice truckers first sign up for the season, to the last truck making it back to base.

programme.title: Ted
programme.desc: Realising John lacks extracurricular activities for college applications, John and Ted audition for the school play. Matty and Susan get jobs at Dunkin' Donuts.

programme.title: Ted
programme.desc: After a meaningless hookup, Blaire navigates an unexpected pregnancy, causing a clash of opinions among the family.

programme.desc: Harry Styles pulls double duty as host and musical guest. Grammy Award winner promotes album Kiss All the Time. Disco, Occasionally. and Together, Together tour.

programme.desc: In a time when creditors have closed their purse strings and stopped lending, the residents of Detroit know they can always rely on American Jewelry and Loan, 'The Working Man's Bank'. Follow the Gold family as they wheel and deal with colourful customers, manage temperamental employees, and squabble with each other, all in the name of making a buck in one of the most troubled cities in America.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies passes judgement as Julian Clary smashes a table, Lucy Beaumont chews on a tree, and Sam Campbell gets under some lint.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant eighteen wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year. The episodes will form a narrative arch - taking the viewer on a journey from when the experienced and novice truckers first sign up for the season, to the last truck making it back to base.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: There's a dream home - and there's a dream location. Cabin Truckers follows the incredible exploits of hauling colossal cabins to remote, picturesque locations. Watch as an expert team navigates through extremely rocky, mountainous terrain, delivering precious cargo to thrilled homeowners. Sara Wynker works for Wades House Moving and has found the perfect bungalow for her son. She made a deal with Wade to trade the house for three days of work but what should be an easy move is derailed by unexpected fog.

programme.title: Summer Heights High
programme.desc: Ja'mie and her friends fight to have a Year 11 formal; Jonah has to hang around Year 7 boys and Mr G is made to include some of the Special-Ed kids in his musical.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Crassus is building a new housing estate with no regard for health or safety, which results in Stylax's death. Builder Jason turns up to reveal he inadvertently killed Stylax due to Crassus's disregard for rules.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Despite only being open a few days, the boys' bar receives a devastating 'one fork' review from the leading food critic in Rome. Grumio invites her back for a rematch with his experimental new menu.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: The team heads to a remote target they believe to be the long-lost Marine Sulphur Queen; this tanker disappeared in 1963 with a crew of 39 and is one of the most iconic missing Bermuda Triangle wrecks.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: The day gets off to a rough start with a van fire on the highway. Then an apprentice spray painter's self-painted vehicle results in an unroadworthy vehicle, and a day of speeders.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers. It is vast, untamed, and home to some of the toughest to reach places on Earth. For the giant trucks who roam this epic, harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B - the hard way. Whether it's taking on scorching deserts, battling torrential rains that turn roads into rivers, or braving a continent's worth of brutal bitumen and desolate dirt, this is a land that can destroy trucks and truckers in a heartbeat. But for the men and women who risk their rigs and their lives to face it, this punishing wilderness is a home away from home. We hit the road train again, for a season of dirt, dramas and dangers, joining some of the toughest, most skilled truckers on the planet, as they haul their massive loads through hell on Earth. Without them, Australia would grind to a halt. Their mission: to get their freight in and their trucks out.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on Earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant 18-wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub-zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell
programme.desc: See how a heavy recovery firm works through the hard winters helping highway users that have fallen victim to the brutal road conditions.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick rocks out when a seller brings in a blazer worn by the Rolling Stones' Keith Richards. Can he get some satisfaction, or will he exile the jacket? Then, Chum brings out his inner warrior when a Japanese samurai mask hits the counter. Will he be able to scare up a good price? Meanwhile, Corey tries to paint a picture-perfect deal when a Norman Rockwell autograph comes into the shop. And later, Rick and Chum head to the range to see a big game gun. Will the duo land this huge deal?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Storage unit auctions are the newest and biggest untapped source for hidden treasures, and opportunistic individuals bid on unclaimed properties hoping to strike gold. In this character-driven treasure hunt, bidders range from twenty-somethings out for fun and adventure, willing to say or do anything to win, to husband and wife teams looking to make fast and large cash, and all are prepared to create quite the drama in the process. It's a dramatic environment as the bidders assess if they think the unit is worth a bid and how high they will actually go. In each self-contained episode, our cast of characters head to storage units and wait anxiously for the big reveal of what is behind the door. The owner of the facility will cut the lock to a delinquent unit and raise the door for the first time, allowing bidders to peer inside for a brief moment, aided only by a flashlight.
